race.comment: HUSH HUSH (11) looked good winning at Kembla Grange when resuming before not being too far away in Sydney Saturday grade last time out. Looks very well placed here and gets Maloney on board to navigate from the sticky draw. Has the class to figure prominently. VALOROUS POWER (4) is another that has been performing in harder Sydney contests and will be ready to peak now third run back from the break. Gets 2kg off with the claim and must be respected out of the Lees yard. SAINT ALDWYN (7) has hit a purple patch of form with two wins and three placings from his past five starts and is usually thereabouts. Top-three contender. ALL KINDS OF FOLK (9) has taken on stronger races than this since a fresh win so is better placed.
